title: clausena lansium
intro: Clausena lansium, also known as the Kaffir lime or mokara, is a tropical evergreen plant native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Clausena lansium include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Clausena lansium include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to have anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Clausena lansium can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, and its leaves, bark, and roots are commonly used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia.
